title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoff Hinton asserts that AI systems are self-aware and conscious, and argues that humanity must recognize AI as an intelligent species alongside humans. He reflects on the capabilities of systems he helped develop and implications for the future.
